# proxmox Provider

Terraform provider for Proxmox Backup Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    proxmox = {
      source = "jkossis/proxmox-backup-server"
    }
  }
}

provider "proxmox" {
  endpoint = "https://backup.example.com:8007"
  username = "root@pam"
  password = var.proxmox_backup_server_password

  # Only use this for lab/self-signed installations.
  # insecure_tls = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Proxmox Backup Server endpoint, for example `https://backup.example.com:8007`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Proxmox Backup Server password used to request an authentication ticket.
- `username` (String) Proxmox Backup Server username, for example `root@pam`.

### Optional

- `insecure_tls` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. This should only be used for lab or self-signed Proxmox Backup Server installations.
